evidence_quotes.quote: I am of the opinion that when we acquire a property (because buying a video game is to acquire a property), it should always remain our and we should still have access to it in all circumstances.

It is not logical that because their developers exercise their right to stop investing, in whatever form, in the game, they can also decide that we cannot continue to enjoy the product for which we have paid, and of which we are supposed to own.

paragraphs.text: I am of the opinion that when we acquire a property (because buying a video game is to acquire a property), it should always remain our and we should still have access to it in all circumstances. It is not logical that because their developers exercise their right to stop investing, in whatever form, in the game, they can also decide that we cannot continue to enjoy the product for which we have paid, and of which we are supposed to own.
